title: Analytics Platform Rescue
summary: A leadership dashboard is producing inconsistent revenue figures days before a board meeting.
stakes: Board reporting, investor confidence and regulatory traceability

stages.title: Ambiguous brief
stages.objective: Clarify the problem, users, scope and acceptance criteria.
stages.inject: The CFO says the dashboard is wrong, but Finance and Sales disagree on the definition of revenue.

stages.title: Data diagnosis
stages.objective: Trace the inconsistency across source data, SQL logic and transformation rules.
stages.inject: A late-arriving orders feed was replayed twice after a pipeline restart.

stages.title: Controlled repair
stages.objective: Design a restart-safe correction and validation plan.
stages.inject: Operations refuses a full reload because the reporting window is too tight.

stages.title: Production incident
stages.objective: Respond to a fresh issue while protecting the board deadline.
stages.inject: Regional totals suddenly drop by 18% after the hotfix.

stages.title: Release and defence
stages.objective: Ship, communicate and defend the solution.
stages.inject: The CFO asks why this will not happen again.

title: Checkout Recovery
summary: Checkout conversion has fallen after a frontend release, and duplicate orders are appearing.
stakes: Revenue loss, customer trust and payment integrity

stages.title: Customer-impact brief
stages.objective: Separate user symptoms from technical assumptions.
stages.inject: Support reports double charges, but payment logs show only one successful capture.

stages.title: Cross-layer diagnosis
stages.objective: Investigate browser events, API idempotency and database state.
stages.inject: The submit handler is bound twice on one route transition.

stages.title: Resilient implementation
stages.inject: A retry from the browser can arrive after the first response times out.

stages.title: Traffic spike
stages.objective: Protect the system under a sudden load increase.
stages.inject: A promotional campaign doubles checkout traffic during deployment.

stages.title: Recovery release
stages.objective: Release safely and demonstrate restored trust.
stages.inject: Leadership asks for proof that duplicate orders cannot recur.

title: Legacy Service Modernisation
summary: A fragile monolithic order service must be stabilised before a major product launch.
stakes: Order fulfilment, launch readiness and operational resilience

stages.title: Modernisation brief
stages.objective: Define boundaries, risks and success measures.
stages.inject: The service has no reliable test suite and deploys require a two-hour outage.

stages.title: Architecture diagnosis
stages.objective: Identify coupling, transaction and persistence risks.
stages.inject: Order validation, payment calls and database writes happen inside one controller.

stages.title: Incremental modernisation
stages.objective: Create a safe strangler-style migration plan.
stages.inject: The business refuses a full rewrite.

stages.title: Database contention
stages.inject: Lock waits rise sharply when bulk fulfilment starts.

stages.title: Zero-downtime release
stages.inject: The launch window permits only ten minutes of elevated risk.
